name: Jiangsu Wuyang Parking Industry Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Wuyang Parking Industry Group Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, design, production, and sale of automation equipment in China and internationally. It offers intelligent parking investment, construction, operation, and integration services. The company provides intelligent parking solutions for government organizations, hospitals, schools, etc. It also offers automated production lines, logistics and intelligent warehousing systems, belt conveyor core devices, dry mortar mixing stations, concrete mixing plants, tubular busbars, mine safety equipment, solid state electronic hard disk products, and unmanned boats, as well as financial services. The company was formerly known as Xuzhou Wuyang Technology Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangsu Wuyang Parking Industry Group Co., Ltd. in January 2018. Jiangsu Wuyang Parking Industry Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Xuzhou, China.
